title: SkyFall
description: QoL mod for hypixel skyblock on 1.21.
body:
# SkyFall Hypixel Skyblock QOL Mod for the Newest Versions of Minecraft. > [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/qZ885qTvkx) # Features ### Gui - Open Config key - Open Hud Editor key ### Chat - Hide Watchdog Messages - Hide SkyMall Messages - Hide Fire Sale Messages ### Dungeon - Requeue Keybind - Short Commands (/f1 -> /m7) ### Foraging - Whisper Tracker for Perk Leveling ### Garden - Mouse Sensitivity - Warp to Spawn Hotkey - Garden Map ### Inventory - Attribute Menu Extra Info - Favorite Power Stone - Favorite Abi Contact - Favorite Pets ### Mining - Powder Tracker for Perk Leveling ### Misc - Hide Block Breaking Particles - Hide Potion Hud - Command Keybinds - Realistic Space Helmet
Planned features
  • Garden Lane Waypoints and Map Integration
  • Player Inventory Overlay
  • Waypoint Support for Custom Imports (for cw, st, odin imports)
  • Party Chat Commands
